prompt: Turn detailed outline into blog post about API rate limiting

assertions.name: both_versions_exist
assertions.description: Both Vietnamese and English files are created

assertions.name: preserves_structure
assertions.description: Maintains the outline structure while enhancing content

assertions.name: has_all_strategies
assertions.description: Covers all 4 rate limiting strategies: fixed window, sliding window, token bucket, leaky bucket

assertions.name: has_implementation_code
assertions.description: Includes working implementation examples with Redis and Express

assertions.name: has_comparison_table
assertions.description: Compares the different strategies with pros/cons

assertions.name: covers_http_headers
assertions.description: Explains X-RateLimit headers and 429 status code usage

assertions.name: proper_error_handling
assertions.description: Shows how to handle rate limit violations with proper responses
